overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The rider navigates from open downtown streets with large digital billboards, under massive elevated highway structures, and into underground parking areas. Wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon signage throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: crossing yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at intersection
navigating through intersection with slight right turn

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle through wet downtown streets, navigating between other vehicles and intersections

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes on wet asphalt
tall modern structures with glass facades and neon signage
reflective black pavement showing neon light reflections
bright purple and pink illuminated business signs

segments.scene_description: Driving through open downtown streets at night, surrounded by towering commercial buildings with bright digital billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights as the motorcycle crosses pedestrian crosswalks and navigates light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane roadway beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: entering the covered area beneath massive elevated highway structure
overtaking a white van on the right side

agents.ego_description: speeding under the elevated highway, maneuvering between concrete pillars and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning across the roadway
glowing blue lines embedded along the road edges
thick cylindrical columns supporting the overhead highway

segments.scene_description: Now driving beneath the massive elevated highway, the environment becomes more enclosed with concrete pillars lining both sides. The road features distinctive blue neon edge lighting while the overhead structure blocks most of the sky. The motorcycle follows a white van through this concrete canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage with service corridors

events.description: entering underground parking garage with low concrete ceiling
passing through section with red painted walls and warning signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dimly lit underground parking area, slowing for tight corridors

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and fluorescent lighting
concrete walls painted bright red with industrial markings
long white light fixtures mounted on ceiling
metal industrial doors with warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a fully enclosed underground parking garage with low concrete ceilings and fluorescent lighting. The environment features distinctive red painted walls, industrial service doors, and a more confined spatial layout compared to the open streets above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the vibrant, open streets of a neon-lit metropolis into the claustrophobic depths of an industrial garage. It begins by gliding through a downtown district where towering commercial buildings and bright digital billboards cast colorful reflections across the wet asphalt. As the motorcycle moves forward, the open sky vanishes and the environment becomes a concrete canyon beneath a massive elevated highway, characterized by heavy pillars and blue neon edge lighting. The scene then shifts from this semi-enclosed passage into a fully subterranean parking garage, where the lighting transitions to sterile fluorescents. Finally, the camera navigates a confined spatial layout defined by low concrete ceilings and industrial red walls.
